__inputs.name: DS_MYSQL
__inputs.label: MySQL
__inputs.description: MySQL data source pointing at the NextReel application database

dashboard.title: NextReel Product Analytics
dashboard.description: Founder-style product KPIs sourced directly from the application MySQL database. Sibling dashboard to the operational Prometheus dashboard at ops/grafana-dashboard.json. SQL definitions are mirrored in ops/product_analytics_queries.sql.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_users FROM users;
SELECT SUM(created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY) AS new_7d FROM users;
SELECT SUM(created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY) AS new_30d FROM users;

panels.title: DAU (last 24h)
panels.description: Distinct authenticated user_ids with at least one nav-state activity timestamp inside the last 24 hours. Anonymous sessions excluded.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS dau FROM user_navigation_state WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND last_activity_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;

panels.title: MAU (last 30d)
panels.description: Distinct authenticated user_ids active in the last 30 days. Anonymous sessions excluded.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS mau FROM user_navigation_state WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND last_activity_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY;
SELECT auth_provider, COUNT(*) AS users FROM users GROUP BY auth_provider ORDER BY users DESC;
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS signups FROM users WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY time ORDER BY time;
SELECT DATE(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS signups FROM users WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 12 WEEK GROUP BY time ORDER BY time;

panels.title: DAU by day (last 30 days)
panels.description: Distinct user_ids active per day. Anonymous sessions excluded. last_activity_at is per-session, so a single user with multiple concurrent sessions still counts once per day.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE(last_activity_at) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS dau FROM user_navigation_state WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND last_activity_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY time ORDER BY time;

panels.title: Weekly cohort retention
panels.description: Each row is a signup-week cohort. retained_dN counts users from that cohort whose most-recent nav-state activity is at least N days after signup. d*_pct is the retention percentage. Approximate — uses MAX(last_activity_at) as the 'still around' signal in lieu of an event log.

targets.rawSql: WITH cohorts AS (SELECT user_id, DATE(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY)) AS cohort_week, created_at AS signup_at FROM users WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 12 WEEK), last_seen AS (SELECT user_id, MAX(last_activity_at) AS most_recent FROM user_navigation_state WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY user_id) SELECT c.cohort_week, COUNT(*) AS cohort_size, SUM(ls.most_recent >= c.signup_at + INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS retained_d1, SUM(ls.most_recent >= c.signup_at + INTERVAL 7 DAY) AS retained_d7, SUM(ls.most_recent >= c.signup_at + INTERVAL 30 DAY) AS retained_d30, ROUND(100 * SUM(ls.most_recent >= c.signup_at + INTERVAL 1 DAY) / COUNT(*), 1) AS d1_pct, ROUND(100 * SUM(ls.most_recent >= c.signup_at + INTERVAL 7 DAY) / COUNT(*), 1) AS d7_pct, ROUND(100 * SUM(ls.most_recent >= c.signup_at + INTERVAL 30 DAY) / COUNT(*), 1) AS d30_pct FROM cohorts c LEFT JOIN last_seen ls ON ls.user_id = c.user_id GROUP BY c.cohort_week ORDER BY c.cohort_week DESC;

panels.title: Watched-list size distribution
panels.description: How many movies the average user has marked as watched. The '0' bucket captures signups that never engaged.

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket, COUNT(*) AS users FROM (SELECT u.user_id, CASE WHEN COUNT(w.tconst) = 0 THEN '0' WHEN COUNT(w.tconst) < 5 THEN '1-4' WHEN COUNT(w.tconst) < 10 THEN '5-9' WHEN COUNT(w.tconst) < 25 THEN '10-24' WHEN COUNT(w.tconst) < 100 THEN '25-99' ELSE '100+' END AS bucket FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_watched_movies w USING (user_id) GROUP BY u.user_id) per_user GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY FIELD(bucket, '0', '1-4', '5-9', '10-24', '25-99', '100+');

panels.title: Watchlist size distribution
panels.description: How many movies the average user has saved for later.

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket, COUNT(*) AS users FROM (SELECT u.user_id, CASE WHEN COUNT(wl.tconst) = 0 THEN '0' WHEN COUNT(wl.tconst) < 5 THEN '1-4' WHEN COUNT(wl.tconst) < 10 THEN '5-9' WHEN COUNT(wl.tconst) < 25 THEN '10-24' ELSE '25+' END AS bucket FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_watchlist wl USING (user_id) GROUP BY u.user_id) per_user GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY FIELD(bucket, '0', '1-4', '5-9', '10-24', '25+');
